data.description:

data.title: Bitcoin’s “Bullish Death Cross” Could Send BTC Toward $130,000
data.description:
New report has sparked fresh market excitement after highlighting a historically bullish signal forming on Bitcoin’s chart: a 50-day moving average (50MA) slipping below the 200-day moving average (200MA), a pattern known as a death cross, but one that has repeatedly triggered major upside for BTC in past cycles.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoins-bullish-death-cross-could-send-btc-toward-130000/

data.title: Alphabet Overtakes NVIDIA in Year-to-Date Growth
data.description:
Alphabet has officially pulled ahead of NVIDIA in 2025 performance, marking one of the most unexpected shifts in this year’s “Magnificent Seven” dynamics. While NVIDIA remains the largest company in the group by market capitalization at $4. 630 trillion, new market data shows Alphabet’s momentum is now stronger, with year-to-date gains of +10. 1%, surpassing NVIDIA’s +6
source: https://www.ethnews.com/alphabet-overtakes-nvidia-in-year-to-date-growth/

data.title: Bitcoin On-Chain Signals Flash Mixed Messages as Puell Multiple Cools and Whales Keep Accumulating
data.description:
Bitcoin just posted one of its steepest retracements of the cycle, falling roughly 24% from recent highs. But beneath the volatility, two major on-chain indicators shared by CryptoQuant analysts, the Puell Multiple and whale accumulation trends, reveal a more nuanced picture of where the market may be heading next.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/bitcoin-on-chain-signals-flash-mixed-messages-as-puell-multiple-cools-and-whales-keep-accumulating/

data.title: AI sets odds of Bitcoin hitting another record in 2025
data.description:
As Bitcoin (BTC) continues to face bearish sentiment, crashing below the $100,000 spot, an artificial intelligence model has set odds of the asset hitting another record high before the end of the year. Notably, as of press time, Bitcoin was trading at $95,731, down 0.5% in the past 24 hours, and almost 6% lower on the timeline. At the current price, the cryptocurrency is down about 25% from its all-time high of $126,000
source: https://finbold.com/ai-sets-odds-of-bitcoin-hitting-another-record-in-2025/

data.title: Crypto mining is profitable for Kyrgyzstan and will resume after winter, President says
data.description:
Kyrgyzstan profits from cryptocurrency mining and will allow it to continue after the cold winter months, the country’s president has promised. The Central Asian nation unplugged its crypto farms this week amid electricity shortages exacerbated by low water levels in dams used to generate hydroelectric power. Kyrgyzstan benefits from mining and will restore operations Mining […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/crypto-mining-is-profitable-for-kyrgyzstan/
